description_long: This object is a rectangular, compact electronic device with a predominantly gray and black color scheme, accented by two prominent red circular buttons. The top surface features a black panel with a cross-shaped directional pad on the left, two small rectangular buttons in the center, and the two red buttons on the right. The device is labeled with the Nintendo brand, indicating it is a classic NES controller, known for its simple and iconic design. The body is made of hard plastic, with visible seams and a slightly raised edge around the perimeter. The controller is flat and lightweight, designed to be held comfortably in both hands, with all controls easily accessible from the top face. There are no visible screens or displays, and the back and sides are plain, with a possible port or cable slot for connection.
description: A rectangular, gray and black Nintendo NES controller with a cross-shaped directional pad, two red buttons, and two small rectangular buttons on the top face. The design is flat, compact, and made of hard plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full layout: directional pad on the left, two small rectangular buttons in the center, and two red circular buttons on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the raised buttons on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the controller, with the red buttons now on the left and the directional pad on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the flatness and the arrangement of the buttons and directional pad.
